project_type: Next.js 16 App Router static site with React 19
build_system: npm with Next.js (Turbopack). Config in next.config.ts. Tailwind v4 via @tailwindcss/postcss plugin in postcss.config.mjs.
test_framework: No test framework currently configured. Validation is via npm run build (static generation) and npm run lint (eslint).
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build - must produce successful static build with all snippet pages generated. 2. Run npm run lint - must pass with no errors. 3. Verify all MDX snippets generate static pages in build output.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm access. Node.js 22, npm, pnpm available. AGENTS.md warns Next.js 16 has breaking changes vs training data - check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ for current API.
contribution_requirements: Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes. Ensure Semantic HTML for all layout sections. Maintain dark/light mode support (next-themes, class-based). Keep static generation (no API routes for data).
key_patterns: 1. App Router pages in app/ directory. 2. params is a Promise in Next.js 16 (await params in generateMetadata and page components). 3. Client components use 'use client' directive. 4. Dark mode via next-themes ThemeProvider with class attribute. 5. @custom-variant dark in globals.css for Tailwind v4. 6. useMounted() hook pattern for hydration-safe theme UI. 7. generateStaticParams + dynamicParams=false for SSG pages. 8. MDX support per docs: use @next/mdx with mdx-components.tsx file, dynamic imports for content, remark/rehype plugins. 9. OG images via opengraph-image.tsx file convention using ImageResponse from next/og. 10. Tailwind v4 uses CSS-first config (@import 'tailwindcss' in globals.css, @theme inline block).
directory_structure: app/ - routes (layout.tsx, page.tsx, snippets/page.tsx, snippets/[id]/page.tsx). components/ - shared UI (Navbar, Footer, CopyButton, SnippetSearch, ThemeProvider, landing/). hooks/ - useMounted.ts. lib/ - data.ts (current snippet store). public/ - static assets.
